details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 90-min automatic afternoon lesson between 2026-03-10 and 2026-03-14
Task 2: Buy beginner 5-lesson package <= $300 with home pickup near 10001
Task 3: Book two manual 60-min lessons with Spanish-speaking instructor under $60/hour
Task 4: Reschedule next upcoming lesson to a Saturday morning
Task 5: Apply SAVE10 to beginner package and add extra 60-min lesson with same instructor
Task 6: Book mock driving test tomorrow evening near Downtown Test Center
Task 7: Update learner profile (beginner, automatic, address) and start new booking using it
Task 8: Use DRIVEX150 gift card with full balance to buy a package
Task 9: Cancel cancellable booking and rebook evening lesson with same instructor next week
